markdown:
# Feinting Attack

As a [[bonus_action Action]], you can expend one Superiority Die to feint, choosing one creature within 5 feet of yourself as your target. You have [[advantage]] on your next attack roll against that target this turn. If that attack hits, add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll.
